race.comment: MISS TALLCHIEF (11) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 1.75 lengths from the winner in third over 1012m at Werribee. She hasn't won in a while but looks to be coming good and Bates will give her every hope from a low draw. CELESTIAL SPLENDOR (4) resumes after a break of four months. Looking to emulate her debut win over 1200m at Warrnambool to kick off last prep and she has the upside to do so despite a very wide gate. MOSQUITO AWARD (7) missed the placings two starts back when resuming then ran a better race and finished 2.75 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1200m at Kilmore. Can improve again and should take catching. SIERRA DEE JAY (3) is back from a spell of five months and does go well when fresh, including a win to launch last campaign over 1400m at this track. He won his only go here and should take beating.
